---
title: "John Penfold | Focused Photograpic"
subtitle: "Experienced Hasselblad and Nikon Specialist with Great Customer Focus"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: JP.webp
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:focusedphotographic@hotmail.com"
    - icon: cart3
      text: My e-bay
      href: "http://www.ebay.co.uk/sch/imagingeye/m.html?_nkw=&_armrs=1&_ipg=&_from="
    - icon: telephone
      text: 07917 116974
---

:::{#hero-heading}
:::

<br/>

::: {.camera-list}
- I'd love to hear from you ... whether you're buying, selling or just want some guidance
- You're always welcome to visit me in Leeds or meet me at my usual spot at the main camera fairs (including Photographica, Wolverhampton and Frome)
- After starting in the camera business in 1990, I've run Focused Photographic since 2004. ('Focused' because I care about giving great customer service, and mainly feature Hasselblad and Nikon.)
:::
